metadata.title: HemaChain · Blood donation traceability
metadata.description: Immutable, auditable and interoperable traceability of blood donations on Ethereum. A reference implementation of Resolution 536/2026 of Argentina's Ministry of Health.

banner.wrongNetwork: You're on a network other than {expected}.
banner.noInjected: We didn't detect MetaMask or another injected wallet. Install an Ethereum extension to connect.

hero.title: Blood donation traceability on Ethereum.
hero.subtitle: From donor to recipient, every event is recorded in an immutable contract. Automated look-back, audited cold chain, certifications as NFTs.

stats.title: System status
stats.subtitle: Demo values (local Anvil). In production they update in real time via the indexer.

innovation.title: Why HemaChain
innovation.subtitle: Differentiators vs. a legacy system or a generic traceability skeleton.

lookback.title: Automated look-back
lookback.body: A single on-chain call marks as Recalled every component derived from a donor with a later adverse result.

coldChain.title: Audited cold chain
coldChain.body: Each transfer records temperature; a reading out of range triggers the automatic switch to the Recalled state.

certificates.title: Certificates as NFTs
certificates.body: ERC-721 with the PDF hash anchored on IPFS. Cryptographic verification before rendering.

privacy.title: Privacy by design
privacy.body: No PII on-chain. Only hashes (keccak256 with an institutional salt). Compliant with Ley 25.326.

chagas.title: Argentine screening panel
chagas.body: Chagas is mandatory in the serology panel. Regional specificity, not replicable by copying a generic model.

public.title: Public verification
public.body: A QR printed on the unit points to /verify/[id] — accessible without a wallet, without login, on any device.

regulatory.title: Anchored in Resolution 536/2026
regulatory.body: Argentina's Ministry of Health is modernizing the National Blood System and requires computerized traceability across every hemotherapy center, with a two-year implementation deadline. HemaChain is a technical reference implementation, compatible with the global ISBT 128 standard.

network.title: National network of institutions
network.subtitle: Blood banks, laboratories, fractionation centers, transfusion-medicine services, hemovigilance and accreditation connected to a single ledger. Off-chain coordinates (the chain only stores geolocation hashes).

cta.title: Ready to explore?
cta.body: Connect your wallet, request a role and start walking through the full lifecycle of a blood unit.

footer.tagline: Reference implementation · MIT · adaptable to any hemotherapy service.

verify.label: Verify

search.title: Verify a unit or component
search.subtitle: Enter the identifier printed on the bag's QR code.
search.hint: No wallet or sign-up: the query is public and read-only.

qr.title: Share verification
qr.hint: Scan or print this code to return to this page.

verify.anon: Privacy by design: on-chain there are only irreversible hashes (Ley 25.326). No personal data of the donor or patient ever leaves the originating institution.

notFound.title: No results
notFound.body: There is no record for identifier {id}.

invalid.title: Invalid identifier
invalid.body: Use a number, or the u/c prefix (for example u3 for a unit, c5 for a component).

hero.title: Request your role in HemaChain
hero.subtitle: Identify yourself as a Blood Bank, Laboratory or another institution. An Administrator reviews your request and approves the role. Once approved, you gain access to the corresponding dashboard.

form.title: Institutional role request
form.subtitle: The request is recorded on-chain. Only the Admin can approve it.
form.name: Institution name
form.countryHint: Two-letter code, e.g. AR, BR, UY.
form.networkWarning: Switch to the configured network before submitting.

errors.name: The name must be at least 2 characters.

noInjected.title: Wallet not detected
noInjected.body: Install MetaMask or another Ethereum extension to request a role.

notConnected.title: Connect your wallet
notConnected.body: We need your address to record the request on-chain.

alreadyHasRole.title: You already have a role
alreadyHasRole.body: Your current role is {role}. You can't request another while it's active.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Actions available based on your active role.
dashboard.wrongNetworkHint: You're on a network other than the configured one — some actions stay blocked until you switch.

noInjected.title: Wallet not detected
noInjected.body: Install MetaMask or another Ethereum extension to use the dashboard.

connect.title: Connect your wallet
connect.body: We need your address to resolve your role on-chain.

noRole.title: You don't have a role yet
noRole.body: Request one and wait for the Admin to approve it.

admin.title: You're an Administrator
admin.body: You can approve or reject pending role requests.

roleAssigned.title: Your role is active
roleAssigned.body: The specialized dashboard for your role will be available in the next release.
roleAssigned.bodyWithName: Registered institution: {name} ({country}). Enter the dashboard to start operating.
roleAssigned.placeholder: Coming soon: actions specific to this role (Layer B.2: hospital, auditor, certifier).

bancoSangre.title: Blood Bank
bancoSangre.subtitle: Record donations and inspect your unit inventory.

form.title: Record donation
form.subtitle: Only the hash of the ID number is stored on-chain. Production uses a hash with a secret institutional salt (Ley 25.326 / SDD §11.4).
form.dniHint: The system computes keccak256(DNI). In production a secret institutional salt is added.

errors.dni: The ID number must be at least 4 characters.

list.title: My recent donations
list.subtitle: Units collected by this institution (derived from DonationCollected events).
list.empty: You haven't recorded any donations yet.

laboratorio.title: Screening laboratory
laboratorio.subtitle: Record serology results and decide whether to release or quarantine each unit.

queue.title: Units pending screening
queue.subtitle: Collected status — awaiting recordTestResult with the HIV/HBV/HCV/syphilis/HTLV/Chagas panel.

decisions.title: Post-screening decisions
decisions.subtitle: Units in UnderTest status await release or quarantine.
decisions.reasonPrompt: Quarantine reason (recorded on-chain in the event):
decisions.mustQuarantine: Positive markers present: the contract blocks release; quarantine only.

unitDetail.title: Unit #{id}
unitDetail.subtitle: Full traceability of the donation.
unitDetail.invalidIdBody: The unit ID must be numeric.
unitDetail.notFoundBody: There is no unit with id #{id}.

qr.title: Public verification
qr.hint: Printable QR code for the bag — points to the public /verify page.

componentDetail.title: Component #{id}
componentDetail.subtitle: Custody chain, expiry and reverse traceability.
componentDetail.invalidIdBody: The component ID must be numeric.
componentDetail.notFoundBody: There is no component with id #{id}.

qr.title: Public verification
qr.hint: Printable QR code for the bag — points to the public /verify page.

banco.title: Bank / Warehouse
banco.subtitle: Inventory of components in custody and dispatch with cold chain.

inventory.title: Inventory in custody
inventory.subtitle: Components whose current custody is your wallet.

transfer.title: Transfer custody
transfer.subtitle: The contract records the temperature. Out of range → the unit automatically moves to Recalled (broken cold chain).
transfer.toHint: Address of another registered, active institution.
transfer.tempWarning: Temperature out of the accepted range — the contract will trigger a recall.

toast.successButRecalled: Transfer OK but the temperature triggered a recall.

inventory.title: Components received
inventory.subtitle: Components whose current custody is this hospital.

crossMatch.title: Cross-match
crossMatch.subtitle: Reserves a Produced/InStorage component for a patient identified by hash.
crossMatch.noneAvailable: No components available. Ask the bank to transfer custody.
crossMatch.patientHint: Medical record or ID number. Hashed client-side (production: + institutional salt).

errors.patient: The identifier must be at least 4 characters.

auditor.title: Hemovigilance
auditor.subtitle: Report adverse events and audit on-chain activity.

form.title: Report adverse event
form.subtitle: For DonorPositive, the contract triggers look-back and marks as Recalled every derived unit/component.

triggerHints.DonorPositive: Donor ID number — the hash must match the donorIdHash of the donations to recall.
triggerHints.RecipientReaction: Patient reference (only logged on-chain, no propagated recall).
triggerHints.EquipmentFailure: Equipment ID or serial (log only, no propagated recall).

errors.trigger: The identifier must be at least 4 characters.

timeline.title: Recent timeline
timeline.subtitle: Last 40 contract events, ordered from the most recent block.

fraccionamiento.title: Fractionation
fraccionamiento.subtitle: Produce components (RBC, FFP, PLT, CRYO) from released units.

queue.title: Available units
queue.subtitle: Released and Processed statuses. The system computes the remaining volume (splitVolumeOf).

form.errorMin: The volume must be greater than 0.

admin.title: Administrator Dashboard
admin.subtitle: Approval and revocation of institutional roles.

denied.title: Restricted access
denied.body: Only addresses with DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE can access this screen.
denied.connect: Connect your administrator wallet to continue.

queue.title: Pending requests
queue.subtitle: Built from RoleRequested/Approved/Rejected events (Phase 7 will switch it to the indexer's SSE).

certificador.title: Certification Dashboard
certificador.subtitle: Issue accreditation certificates as ERC-721 NFTs. The PDF is anchored on IPFS and its hash is committed on-chain for public verification.

issue.title: Issue certificate
issue.subtitle: The PDF is uploaded to IPFS and keccak256(PDF) is recorded on-chain. Anyone can re-hash the file and check that it matches.
issue.subject: Certified institution (address)
issue.subjectHint: Ethereum address of the actor receiving the certificate (NFT).
issue.expiryHint: The certificate automatically becomes Expired on this date.
issue.fileHint: PDF only, up to 10 MB. Its keccak256 is computed before uploading.
issue.modePinata: PDF anchored on IPFS via Pinata.
issue.modeLocal: No PINATA_JWT: the PDF was stored locally (demo mode).

errors.subject: Enter a valid Ethereum address (0x… 40 hex).
errors.expiry: The expiry date must be in the future.

list.title: Issued certificates
list.subtitle: Certificates you issued with this account.
list.empty: You haven't issued any certificates yet.
list.subject: Institution

certificateDetail.title: Certificate #{id}
certificateDetail.subtitle: Public verification of the NFT certificate. The PDF is re-hashed in your browser and compared against the on-chain commitment.
certificateDetail.invalidIdBody: The certificate identifier must be a number.
certificateDetail.notFoundBody: There is no certificate with id #{id}.
certificateDetail.subject: Certified institution

verify.match: PDF verified: the hash matches the on-chain record.
verify.mismatch: The hash does NOT match — the document was altered.
verify.error: Could not download the PDF to verify the hash.

revoke.title: Revoke certificate
revoke.subtitle: As a Certifier you can revoke this valid certificate.

ai.title: Ask HemaChain
ai.subtitle: Traceability in natural language
ai.placeholder: Ask about units, components or expiries…
ai.emptyHint: I read on-chain state: expiries, the lineage of a unit or component, and recent events.
ai.example: How many red blood cell (RBC) units expire in the next 48 hours?
ai.hintMessage: The live assistant needs ANTHROPIC_API_KEY configured in web/.env.local. Without the key it runs in demo mode. Set the key and restart the server to get live answers about the chain.
ai.error: I couldn't process the query. Try again in a few seconds.
